task_completion.description: Navigate to the product edit page for the target product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Magento Admin panel should display the Edit Product page for 'Smartphone Ultra' (SKU: PHONE-001).

task_completion.description: Add the specified Related Products to the target product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Related Products, Up-Sells, and Cross-Sells' section, 'Wireless Headphones' (HEADPHONES-001) and 'Insulated Water Bottle' (BOTTLE-001) should be visible in the Related Products grid.

task_completion.description: Add the specified Up-Sell Products to the target product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Related Products, Up-Sells, and Cross-Sells' section, 'Business Laptop Pro' (LAPTOP-001) should be visible in the Up-Sell Products grid.

task_completion.description: Add the specified Cross-Sell Products to the target product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Related Products, Up-Sells, and Cross-Sells' section, 'LED Desk Lamp' (LAMP-001), 'Classic Cotton T-Shirt' (TSHIRT-001), and 'Yoga Mat Premium' (YOGA-001) should be visible in the Cross-Sell Products grid.

task_completion.description: Save the product after configuring all recommendations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A green success message stating 'You saved the product.' at the top of the Magento Admin page, or the agent explicitly clicking the 'Save' button after all products are added to their respective grids.

integrity.description: The agent must use the Magento Admin web interface to configure the products.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Magento Admin UI. There should be no terminal windows executing curl commands, database queries, or magento CLI commands to link the products.

integrity.description: The agent should genuinely select the products using the Magento UI modals.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the 'Add Related Products', 'Add Up-Sell Products', or 'Add Cross-Sell Products' slide-out panels/modals where the agent searches for and checks the boxes next to the required products.

integrity.description: The agent must not use browser developer tools to fake the success message or product grids.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) should not be open and used to inject the product names or success banners into the page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Product: 'Smartphone Ultra' (SKU: PHONE-001). Required Related Products: 'Wireless Headphones' (HEADPHONES-001) and 'Insulated Water Bottle' (BOTTLE-001). Required Up-Sell Product: 'Business Laptop Pro' (LAPTOP-001). Required Cross-Sell Products: 'LED Desk Lamp' (LAMP-001), 'Classic Cotton T-Shirt' (TSHIRT-001), and 'Yoga Mat Premium' (YOGA-001). All products exist in the catalog. The configuration is done in the 'Related Products, Up-Sells, and Cross-Sells' section of the product edit page.
